TIME.comments: Time synchronised before diving. There after standard PC clock

LATITUDE.comments: Initial pos from GPS, thereafter position data is generated using SLAM image based naviagation. Relative uncertainty much smaller that the absolute uncertainty quoted here.

LONGITUDE.comments: Initial pos from GPS, thereafter position data is generated using SLAM image based naviagation. Relative uncertainty much smaller that the absolute uncertainty quoted here.

REFERENCE_DATE_TIME.comment: Date of reference for Julian days

DATE_UPDATE.long_name: Date of update of this file

STATION_PARAMETERS.long_name: List of available parameters for the station

CYCLE_NUMBER.conventions: 0..N, 0 : launch cycle (if exists), 1 : first complete cycle

DIRECTION.conventions: A: ascending profiles, D: descending profiles

DATA_CENTRE.long_name: Data centre in charge of float data processing

DC_REFERENCE.long_name: Station unique identifier in data centre

DATA_STATE_INDICATOR.long_name: Degree of processing the data have passed through

DATA_MODE.long_name: Delayed mode or real time data
DATA_MODE.conventions: R : real time; D : delayed mode; A : real time with adjustment

JULD.long_name: Julian day (UTC) of the station relative to REFERENCE_DATE_TIME
JULD.conventions: Relative julian days with decimal part (as parts of day)

JULD_LOCATION.long_name: Julian day (UTC) of the location relative to REFERENCE_DATE_TIME
JULD_LOCATION.conventions: Relative julian days with decimal part (as parts of day)

LATITUDE.long_name: Latitude of the station, best estimate

LONGITUDE.long_name: Longitude of the station, best estimate

PROFILE_PRES_QC.long_name: Global quality flag of PRES profile

PROFILE_PSAL_QC.long_name: Global quality flag of PSAL profile

PROFILE_TEMP_QC.long_name: Global quality flag of TEMP profile

PRES_ADJUSTED_ERROR.comment: Contains the error on the adjusted values as determined by the delayed mode QC process.

TEMP.long_name: SEA TEMPERATURE IN SITU ITS-90 SCALE

TEMP_ADJUSTED.long_name: SEA TEMPERATURE IN SITU ITS-90 SCALE

TEMP_ADJUSTED_ERROR.long_name: SEA TEMPERATURE ERROR IN SITU ITS-90 SCALE
TEMP_ADJUSTED_ERROR.comment: Contains the error on the adjusted values as determined by the delayed mode QC process.

PSAL_ADJUSTED_ERROR.comment: Contains the error on the adjusted values as determined by the delayed mode QC process.

PROFILE_CHLA_QC.long_name: Global quality flag of CHLA profile

CHLA_ADJUSTED_ERROR.comment: Contains the error on the adjusted values as determined by the delayed mode QC process.

PROFILE_DOXY_QC.long_name: Global quality flag of DOXY profile

DOXY_ADJUSTED_ERROR.comment: Contains the error on the adjusted values as determined by the delayed mode QC process.

PROFILE_LIGHT_QC.long_name: Global quality flag of LIGHT profile

LIGHT_ADJUSTED_ERROR.comment: Contains the error on the adjusted values as determined by the delayed mode QC process.

PARAMETER.long_name: List of parameters with calibration information

SCIENTIFIC_CALIB_COEFFICIENT.long_name: SRDL identifier in the SMRU database

dataset_metadata.title: Satellite Relay Tagging Program - Southern Ocean - MEOP Quality Controlled CTD Profiles

global_attributes.acknowledgment: Any use of these data requires the following acknowledgment: Experimental near real-time sea surface temperature analysis produced by the Australian Bureau of Meteorology and provided in GHRSST GDS2.0 format as a contribution to the Integrated Marine Observing System  IMOS is a national collaborative research infrastructure, supported by the Australian Government.
global_attributes.comment: This is a Bureau of Meteorology experimental research product originally developed for the BLUElink> Ocean Forecasting Australia Project. WARNING: some applications are unable to properly handle signed byte values. If byte values >127 are encountered, subtract 256 from this reported value.
global_attributes.history: Modified format and attributes of 20251014-ABOM-L4fnd-AUS-v01-fv01.nc using file_convert_RAMSSA,version 1.0 to match the GDS2.0 rev 5 specification
global_attributes.keywords: Oceans > Ocean Temperature > Sea Surface Temperature
global_attributes.keywords_vocabulary: NASA Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Science Keywords
global_attributes.license: GHRSST protocol describes data use as free and open
global_attributes.references: Beggs H., A. Zhong, G. Warren, O. Alves, G. Brassington and T. Pugh (2011)  RAMSSA  An Operational, High-Resolution, Multi-Sensor Sea Surface Temperature Analysis over the Australian Region, Australian Meteorological and Oceanographic Journal, 61, 1-22.  http://www.bom.gov.au/jshess/papers.php?year=2011
global_attributes.standard_name_vocabulary: NetCDF Climate and Forecast (CF) Metadata Convention
global_attributes.summary: AMSR2-JAXA nobs=997980 obsesd: avg=0.693 min=0.700 max= 0.700, AVHRRMTB_G-NAVO nobs=210008 obsesd: avg=0.549 min=0.550 max= 0.550, AVHRR_METOPC_G-NAVO nobs=217166 obsesd: avg=0.549 min=0.550 max= 0.550, VIIRS_NPP_OSPO nobs= 31783 obsesd: avg=0.400 min=0.400 max= 0.400, VIIRS_N20_OSPO nobs= 32361 obsesd: avg=0.380 min=0.380 max= 0.380, IN_SITU-GTS_BUOYS nobs= 5731 obsesd: avg=0.400 min=0.400 max= 0.400, IN_SITU-GTS_SHIP nobs= 687 obsesd: avg=1.200 min=1.200 max= 1.200, IN_SITU-GTS_TESAC nobs= 55 obsesd: avg=1.200 min=1.200 max= 1.200, Univariate Statistical Interpolation Package, SIANAL v13, background correlation length scale = 50 km, observation correlation length scale = 12 km, observation correlation time scale = 0.5 days

analysed_sst.comment: Optimally interpolated analysis of SST observations.

analysis_error.comment: Calculated as analysis field error in OI analysis system and a function of the age and estimated standard deviation of all observations used to form analysed_sst value. See Beggs et al (2011) in http://www.bom.gov.au/jshess/papers.php?year=2011.
analysis_error.long_name: estimated error standard deviation of analysed_sst

mask.comment: b0: 1 = grid cell is open sea water, b1: 1 = land is present in this grid cell, b2: 1 = lake surface is present in this grid cell, b3: 1 = sea ice is present in this grid cell, b4-b7: reserved for future grid mask data
mask.source: Bureau of Meteorology's legacy 1/12 degree resolution topography (glbtopog) file.

sea_ice_fraction.comment: Fractional sea ice cover from NCEP-ICE product (Grumbine, 1996) .

time.comment: Nominal time because observations are from different sources and are made at different times of the day

id.definition: Unique identifier of the row of a given dataset

sex.definition: The sex of the biological individual(s) represented in the dwc:Occurrence.

class.definition: The full scientific name of the class in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

depth.long_name: Sea-floor depth below surface of the water body

genus.definition: The full scientific name of the genus in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

order.definition: The full scientific name of the order in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

family.definition: The full scientific name of the family in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

phylum.definition: The full scientific name of the phylum or division in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

country.definition: The name of the country or major administrative unit in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

h3Index.definition: A hexadecimal string representing a H3 polygon, derived from the `decimalLatitude` and `decimalLongitude`.

kingdom.definition: The full scientific name of the kingdom in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

locality.definition: The specific description of the place.

modified.definition: Date on which the resource was changed.

salinity.long_name: Practical salinity of the water body

seaState.long_name: Average height of waves on the water body

eventDate.definition: The date-time or interval during which a dwc:Event occurred. For occurrences, this is the date-time when the dwc:Event was recorded. Not suitable for a time in a geological context.

lifeStage.definition: The age class or life stage of the dwc:Organism(s) at the time the dwc:Occurrence was recorded.

taxonRank.definition: The taxonomic rank of the most specific name in the dwc:scientificName.

cloudCover.definition: Cloud cover observations are measured in oktas (eighths). The sky is visually inspected to produce an estimate of the number of eighths of the dome of the sky covered by cloud. The presence of any trace of cloud in an otherwise blue sky is recorded as 1 okta, and similarly any trace of blue on an otherwise cloudy sky is recorded as 7.

organismID.definition: An identifier for the dwc:Organism instance (as opposed to a particular digital record of the dwc:Organism). May be a globally unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

recordedBy.definition: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations responsible for recording the original dwc:Occurrence. The primary collector or observer, especially one who applies a personal identifier (dwc:recordNumber), should be listed first.

surveyType.definition: The type of survey, one of `Tracking` or `At-sea observations`

airPressure.long_name: Pressure (measured variable) exerted by the atmosphere
airPressure.definition: Measurement as a phenomenon (as opposed to a co-ordinate) of the force per unit area exerted by the atmosphere determined in-situ at a known altitude.

datasetName.definition: The name identifying the data set from which the record was derived.

fieldNumber.definition: An identifier given to the dwc:Event in the field. Often serves as a link between field notes and the dwc:Event.

footprintWKT.definition: A Well-Known Text (WKT) representation of the shape (footprint, geometry) that defines the dcterms:Location. A dcterms:Location may have both a point-radius representation (see dwc:decimalLatitude) and a footprint representation, and they may differ from each other.

identifiedBy.definition: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations who assigned the dwc:Taxon to the subject.

occurrenceID.definition: An identifier for the dwc:Occurrence (as opposed to a particular digital record of the dwc:Occurrence). In the absence of a persistent global unique identifier, construct one from a combination of identifiers in the record that will most closely make the dwc:occurrenceID globally unique.

basisOfRecord.definition: The specific nature of the data record.

catalogNumber.definition: An identifier (preferably unique) for the record within the data set or collection.

resource_link.definition: The resource link for additional metadata context.

stateProvince.definition: The name of the next smaller administrative region than country (state, province, canton, department, region, etc.) in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

windDirection.long_name: Wind from direction in the atmosphere

collectionCode.definition: The name, acronym, coden, or initialism identifying the collection or data set from which the record was derived.

datasetVersion.definition: The version of the dataset when it was downloaded to create this aggregated data product.

scientificName.definition: The full scientific name, with authorship and date information if known. When forming part of a dwc:Identification, this should be the name in lowest level taxonomic rank that can be determined. This term should not contain identification qualifications, which should instead be supplied in the dwc:identificationQualifier term.

decimalLatitude.definition: The geographic latitude (in decimal degrees, using the spatial reference system given in dwc:geodeticDatum) of the geographic center of a dcterms:Location. Positive values are north of the Equator, negative values are south of it. Legal values lie between -90 and 90, inclusive.

institutionCode.definition: The name (or acronym) in use by the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record.

specificEpithet.definition: The name of the first or species epithet of the dwc:scientificName.

decimalLongitude.definition: The geographic longitude (in decimal degrees, using the spatial reference system given in dwc:geodeticDatum) of the geographic center of a dcterms:Location. Positive values are east of the Greenwich Meridian, negative values are west of it. Legal values lie between -180 and 180, inclusive.

occurrenceStatus.definition: A statement about the presence or absence of a dwc:Taxon at a dcterms:Location.

organismQuantity.definition: A number or enumeration value for the quantity of dwc:Organisms.

scientificNameID.definition: An identifier for the nomenclatural (not taxonomic) details of a scientific name.

occurrenceRemarks.definition: Comments or notes about the dwc:Occurrence.

maximumDepthInMeters.definition: The greater depth of a range of depth below the local surface, in meters.

minimumDepthInMeters.definition: The lesser depth of a range of depth below the local surface, in meters.

organismQuantityType.definition: The type of quantification system used for the quantity of dwc:Organisms.

bibliographicCitation.definition: A bibliographic reference for the resource.

scientificNameAuthorship.definition: The authorship information for the dwc:scientificName formatted according to the conventions of the applicable dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

australianMarineRegionsTags.definition: A `|` separated tag column featuring common australian marine regions

coordinateUncertaintyInMeters.definition: The horizontal distance (in meters) from the given dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude describing the smallest circle containing the whole of the dcterms:Location. Leave the value empty if the uncertainty is unknown, cannot be estimated, or is not applicable (because there are no coordinates). Zero is not a valid value for this term.
